requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) and SIRIM Certification
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——ST设备批准证书（CoA）与SIRIM认证
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——ST設備批准證書（CoA）與SIRIM認證

summary.en: Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST), the Energy Commission of Malaysia, requires EV charging equipment to obtain a Certificate of Approval (CoA) under the Electricity Supply Act 1990 before installation in Malaysia. The ST CoA for EV charging equipment is assessed against MS IEC 61851-1 (the Malaysian adopted version of IEC 61851-1), covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions. IEC 61851-21-2 (EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment) and IEC 61851-23:2023 (DC EV charging stations) apply for DC products. SIRIM QAS International — the national conformity assessment body — administers product certification for electrical equipment imported into Malaysia. IP55 or higher is commonly required for outdoor-rated EV chargers in Malaysia's tropical environment (heavy rain, sustained humidity above 80%). IK10 mechanical impact protection is specified for public charging stations in some project requirements.
summary.zh: 马来西亚能源委员会（ST）要求电动汽车充电设备在马来西亚安装前，依据《1990年电力供应法》取得设备批准证书（CoA）。电动汽车充电设备的ST CoA依据MS IEC 61851-1（IEC 61851-1的马来西亚采纳版本）评定，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-21-2（非车载EVSE的EMC要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流电动汽车充电站）适用于直流产品。SIRIM QAS International是国家合格评定机构，管理进口马来西亚电气设备的产品认证。在马来西亚热带环境（强降雨、持续相对湿度超80%）中，室外电动汽车充电桩通常要求IP55或更高防护等级。部分项目要求公共充电站具备IK10机械冲击防护等级。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞能源委員會（ST）要求電動汽車充電設備在馬來西亞安裝前，依據《1990年電力供應法》取得設備批准證書（CoA）。電動汽車充電設備的ST CoA依據MS IEC 61851-1（IEC 61851-1的馬來西亞採納版本）評定，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-21-2（非車載EVSE的EMC要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流電動汽車充電站）適用於直流產品。SIRIM QAS International是國家合格評定機構，管理進口馬來西亞電氣設備的產品認證。在馬來西亞熱帶環境（強降雨、持續相對濕度超80%）中，室外電動汽車充電樁通常要求IP55或更高防護等級。部分項目要求公共充電站具備IK10機械冲擊防護等級。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) — Malaysia — ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) requirement
MS IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (Malaysian adopted standard)
IEC 61851-21-2:2021 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-2: EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP55 or higher for outdoor Malaysia installations
SIRIM QAS International — electrical product certification for Malaysia

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for MS IEC 61851-accredited test reports required for the ST CoA process or SIRIM product certification. China CCC applies to domestic EV charger markets but is not recognised as a SIRIM certification substitute in Malaysia.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代ST CoA流程或SIRIM产品认证所要求的MS IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。中国CCC适用于国内电动汽车充电桩市场，但在马来西亚不被视为SIRIM认证的替代。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代ST CoA流程或SIRIM產品認證所要求的MS IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。中國CCC適用於國內電動汽車充電樁市場，但在馬來西亞不被視為SIRIM認證的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: an MS IEC 61851-1 clause matrix; accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory accepted by SIRIM; DC-station IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence for DC products; IP55 or higher and IK10 test certificates for outdoor Malaysia installations; thermal and humidity derating evidence for Malaysia's tropical ambient conditions (sustained 35–40 °C and relative humidity 80–95%); and ST CoA application documentation. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as MS IEC 61851 compliance evidence for the ST CoA or SIRIM certification without a clause-level gap assessment and supplementary IEC-accredited testing.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：MS IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵；SIRIM认可的ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；直流产品的IEC 61851-23和IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据；马来西亚室外安装的IP55或更高防护等级及IK10测试证书；马来西亚热带环境（持续35至40°C，相对湿度80至95%）的热降额和湿度降额证据；以及ST CoA申请文件。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估和补充IEC认可测试的情况下，不被视为ST CoA或SIRIM认证的MS IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：MS IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣；SIRIM認可的ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；直流產品的IEC 61851-23和IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據；馬來西亞室外安裝的IP55或更高防護等級及IK10測試證書；馬來西亞熱帶環境（持續35至40°C，相對濕度80至95%）的熱降額和濕度降額證據；以及ST CoA申請文件。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估和補充IEC認可測試的情況下，不被視為ST CoA或SIRIM認證的MS IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) required for EV charging equipment under the Electricity Supply Act 1990 before installation in Malaysia; SIRIM product certification required for electrical equipment imports; IP55 or higher and IK10 enclosure protection required for outdoor Malaysia installations; confirm exact ST CoA scope and SIRIM certification category for specific product type
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 and China CCC apply to China domestic design and certification; neither is accepted as direct MS IEC 61851 evidence or SIRIM certification in Malaysia without additional accredited testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Malaysia-facing EVSE documentation must include MS IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-21-2 evidence for DC stations, IP55-or-higher and IK10 enclosure certificates, humidity and thermal derating evidence for Malaysia's tropical environment, and an ST CoA application package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向马来西亚的EVSE文件必须包括MS IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23和IEC 61851-21-2证据、IP55或更高防护等级及IK10认证书、马来西亚热带环境的湿度和热降额证据，以及ST CoA申请文件包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向馬來西亞的EVSE文件必須包括MS IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23和IEC 61851-21-2證據、IP55或更高防護等級及IK10認證書、馬來西亞熱帶環境的濕度和熱降額證據，以及ST CoA申請文件包。
